segment.source: Renders a rotating slideshow of image slides — each with a lightbox-zoomable picture, optional title, rich-text description and link — in four styles: default, autoplay with interval, thumbnail strip, or a static scrollable card row; arrows and dots can be toggled. Use it for: photo-led highlight sequences — project showcases, event impressions, reference galleries, product visuals in limited space. Prefer 'Image Gallery' for a browsable photo collection; 'Carousel Hero' for a page-top banner; 'Logo Carousel' for logos.
